nasb.text: Their children also will be as formerly, And their congregation shall be established before Me; And I will punish all their oppressors.

esv.text: Their children shall be as they were of old, and their congregation shall be established before me, and I will punish all who oppress them.

cnv.text: 他們的子孫必像以前一樣蒙恩， 他們的國家必在我面前堅立； 我必懲罰所有壓迫他們的人。

ccb.text: 他们的儿女要如往日一样兴旺， 我要使他们的国家坚立， 我要惩罚所有压迫他们的人。
